title: monday_docs upgrade

posts.author: jumakhanrahyab (Jumakhan)
posts.cookedHtml:
I would highly suggest Monday.com to upgrade the features for Doc. It is one of the least developed and basic part of the product. For reference, I have been using Coda to manage of a cohort of 85 fellows for a scholarship program. I wanted to migrate to Monday.com fully, as I manage almost 90% of the project here. But that is not possible unfortunately.
Some specific problems:

  1. You cannot create and move tables around smoothly.
  2. There is not a drop-down or checkbox in the tables.
  3. The tables are not being expanded horizontally, and it compress the text and break it down.
